name: perf budget: --compare-baseline <file> reports rules whose runtime regressed >20% vs baseline
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule slow-rule --in "$PWD/file.js" --compare-baseline "$PWD/baseline.json" 2>out.txt && grep -E 'regression.*slow-rule' out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup: for i in $(seq 1 1000); do echo "const x${i}=${i};" >> file.js; done
